allow: PowerShell(cmd /c 'wsl -e sh -c "export PATH=$PATH:$HOME/.cargo/bin && which cargo && cargo --version"' 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PATH + ";$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin" | Out-Null; $cargoPath = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe"; if \(Test-Path $cargoPath\) { Write-Output "Found: $cargoPath" } else { Write-Output "Not found" })
Bash(ls /c/Users/김광범/.cargo/bin/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 || ls ~/.cargo/bin/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 || which rustc 2>/dev/null || ls /usr/local/cargo/bin/ 2>/dev/null | head -5)
PowerShell(wsl sh -c "which cargo 2>/dev/null || find /home /root /usr -name 'cargo' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -3" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "C:/Users/�豤��/bang:/project" -w /project rust:1.82 sh -c "rustup component add clippy 2>/dev/null; cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/project" -w /project rust:1.82 cargo build 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 80)
